multilingual_propagation.am: am_master.csv: covers items 1–744 (744 items); English has 82 additional items beyond this range. Alignment is safe for the shared range. Parallel split files written (items outside range omitted).
multilingual_propagation.ig: ig_master.csv: covers items 1–744 (744 items); English has 82 additional items beyond this range. Alignment is safe for the shared range. Parallel split files written (items outside range omitted).
multilingual_propagation.zu: zu_master.csv: covers items 1–744 (744 items); English has 82 additional items beyond this range. Alignment is safe for the shared range. Parallel split files written (items outside range omitted).

schema_notes.item_id: Preserved from source item_num (integer string). Unique and stable across all language files.
schema_notes.gold_answer: Normalised to uppercase A or B.
schema_notes.difficulty_score: Normalised weighted sum of: feat_token_len (0.4), feat_clause_markers (0.3), feat_blank_distance (0.3 when available, else redistributed to 0.57/0.43). Higher = harder.
schema_notes.challenge_selection: Top-difficulty items from post-dev pool, label-balanced.
schema_notes.fewshot_selection: Lowest-difficulty medium-length items, label-balanced. Disjoint from all scored splits.
